DomainPrice.title: DomainPrice
DomainPrice.description: Represents the pricing information for a specific domain extension (TLD).

id.description: Unique identifier for the domain price record.

price.description: The display price for the extension (e.g., '$9.99/yr').

displayOrder.description: Order in which this extension appears in the search list.

Feature.title: Feature
Feature.description: Represents a key feature of the web hosting service, displayed to users on the AmarShebaHost website.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Feature entity.

title.description: The name of the feature (e.g., 'High Speed Servers', '99.9% Uptime Guarantee').

description.description: A brief, explanatory description of the feature's benefit or functionality.

iconIdentifier.description: A string representing the icon to be displayed for the feature (e.g., an icon library class name or a URL to an SVG).

displayOrder.description: The numerical order in which the feature should be displayed on the website.

PricingPlan.title: PricingPlan
PricingPlan.description: Defines a web hosting, VPS, or Reseller pricing plan offered by AmarShebaHost.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PricingPlan entity.

name.description: The marketing name of the pricing plan (e.g., 'Basic', 'Standard', 'Premium').

description.description: A short description or tagline summarizing the plan's purpose or target audience.

price.description: The numerical price of the plan.

features.description: A list of key features or benefits included in this specific pricing plan.

isPopular.description: A flag indicating if this plan should be highlighted on the website as the 'most popular' option.

callToActionUrl.description: The URL for the 'Buy Now' button associated with this plan, directing users to purchase.

displayOrder.description: The numerical order in which the pricing plan should be displayed on the website.

Testimonial.title: Testimonial
Testimonial.description: Stores customer reviews and ratings to build trust and credibility for AmarShebaHost.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Testimonial entity.

customerName.description: The full name of the customer who provided the testimonial.

customerTitle.description: The customer's title or affiliation (e.g., 'CEO of ABC Corp', 'Small Business Owner').

reviewText.description: The actual text content of the customer's review or feedback.

rating.description: The customer's rating, typically on a scale of 1 to 5 stars.

datePosted.description: The date and time when the testimonial was posted or recorded.

isApproved.description: A flag indicating whether the testimonial has been approved by an administrator for public display.

displayOrder.description: The numerical order in which the testimonial should appear on the website.

NavigationLink.title: NavigationLink
NavigationLink.description: Represents a menu item or link within the website's navigation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the NavigationLink entity.

title.description: The display text for the navigation link.

url.description: The destination URL for the navigation link.

location.description: Specifies where the link is displayed on the website (e.g., 'hosting', 'reseller', 'domain').

displayOrder.description: The numerical order of the link.

WebsiteContentBlock.title: WebsiteContentBlock
WebsiteContentBlock.description: A generic entity for storing configurable text content or blocks used throughout the website.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WebsiteContentBlock entity.

definition.description: Stores pricing for various domain extensions.
Stores key features of the web hosting service.
Contains details for various hosting, VPS, and reseller plans.
A generic collection for storing various configurable text blocks.
